name: FATHIYA Core Owned Surface

authorized_scope.notes: Owned surface declared by the user. Limited to documentation and scope preparation until a formal written policy exists.
Legacy external deployment mirror. The canonical ops console now lives inside the monorepo fathya-core/fathiya-core. This deployment is retained for historical reference only. See ADR-001.
Repository is in scope for preparation artifacts only; credential access and destructive repository actions are forbidden.
Legacy repository — not source of truth. Canonical architecture lives in fathya-core/fathiya-core monorepo. Retained as historical reference and optional deployment mirror. See ADR-001.

forbidden_scope: Any live external testing against the listed assets before a formal written policy is published.
Exploitation, vulnerability validation, destructive actions, or attempts to bypass controls.
Scanning, automated probing, or rate-based enumeration against live systems.
Credential access, secret retrieval, private data access, or account interaction.
Any third-party activity or action outside declared owned/project surfaces without explicit written policy.
engagement_rules: Mode stays in Lab/Internal Owned Surface Preparation until a formal written policy exists.
Allowed work in this batch is documentation and routing only: Target Card, Scope Map, Boundary Note, Report Draft Template, Queue Entry, and Receipt.
Do not perform live testing, exploitation, automation, or external side effects under this Target Card.
Treat all listed assets as owned_or_project_declared but not yet policy-authorized for active testing.
rate_limits: No automated requests or probing are authorized under this draft Target Card.
Formal rate limits are unknown until written policy publication.
data_handling: Do not access credentials, secrets, private repositories, user accounts, or non-public data.
Use only user-declared ownership context and repository-local knowledge artifacts during preparation.
forbidden_actions: third-party activity without explicit written policy
asset_status: canonical_monorepo: owned_or_project_declared; legacy_external_mirror: fathya-project/fathiya-ops-console. Needs formal policy before active testing.
boundary_note: Scope and authorization preparation only. No live testing, scanning, exploitation, credential workflows, destructive actions, or third-party activity are authorized under this draft Target Card.
